answer:
Alright, so I’d like to talk about my grandfather. He’s someone I truly admire and respect, and honestly, he’s been a significant influence in my life. My grandpa and I have always had a really close relationship; I’d say he’s not just a family member but also kind of a mentor to me.

What I respect most about him is his unwavering integrity. He’s the sort of person who always stands up for what’s right, even when it’s tough. He also has an incredible work ethic. Rain or shine, he gives his all, whether it’s fixing things around the house or helping out neighbors. That kind of dedication is, you know, pretty inspiring. Plus, he’s got this sense of humor that lightens up any situation, which I think is hugely important, especially when times get rough.

As for how he’s influenced me, well, he’s definitely shaped my values and the way I approach challenges. Whenever I’m faced with a tough decision, I try to follow his example—think things through, stay honest, and keep pushing forward no matter what. He’s taught me how to treat people with kindness and respect, which, at the end of the day, makes all the difference. Honestly, I wouldn’t be who I am today without him.
title:
Talk about a person you know and respect.
Who is this person and what is your relationship to them? 
What qualities do you respect most about them? 
 How have they influenced you?
extData:
{"pronuncFile":"/20251024/4b6b97094b764663b8b9787a01d8ba72.mp3","answerTemplate":"点题:  
To begin, I would like to talk about [name of the person], who is someone I truly respect and admire.

关系:  
This person is my [relationship, e.g., father, teacher, close friend], and I have known them for [length of time you have known them].  
We met [explain how you know this person, e.g., at school, through family, at work].

哪些品质:  
What I respect most about [him/her/them] are [list two or three qualities, such as honesty, kindness, determination].  
For example, [he/she/they] always [give a specific action or behavior demonstrating the quality], which really impresses me.

如何影响:  
[He/She/They] has/have influenced me in many ways. Thanks to [him/her/them], I have learned to [mention a skill, attitude, or value you have developed].  
One memorable situation was when [describe a specific instance where the person’s influence was significant], and this made me realize the importance of [lesson you learned].

总结:  
In conclusion, I deeply respect [name or relationship] because of [summarize main qualities or reasons].  
[He/She/They] has/have had a great impact on my life, and I am grateful for [his/her/their] guidance and support.","titleTranslate":"谈谈你认识并尊敬的一个人。
这个人是谁，你们是什么关系？
你最尊敬他们哪些品质？
他们是如何影响你的？"}
